task: Add a maxLength option to slugify: slugify(input, { maxLength: n }) must return a slug no longer than n characters, cut at a hyphen boundary (never mid-word), with no trailing hyphen. For example slugify("the quick brown fox", { maxLength: 10 }) returns "the-quick" and slugify("one two", { maxLength: 7 }) returns "one-two". Without the option, behavior is unchanged. Add test coverage.
